'''âzh-z-f''' ('''kazhazaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lill|lill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lill|lill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-z-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazhazaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhazaf|thizhazaf]] || [[word:jizhazaf|jizhazaf]] || [[word:shizhazaf|shizhazaf]] || [[word:kizhazaf|kizhazaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhazaf|thuthuzhazaf]] || [[word:jujuzhazaf|jujuzhazaf]] || [[word:shushuzhazaf|shushuzhazaf]] || [[word:kukuzhazaf|kukuzhazaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhazaf|thuzhazaf]] || [[word:juzhazaf|juzhazaf]] || [[word:shuzhazaf|shuzhazaf]] || [[word:kuzhazaf|kuzhazaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhazaf|thuzhazaf]] || [[word:juzhazaf|juzhazaf]] || [[word:shuzhazaf|shuzhazaf]] || [[word:kuzhazaf|kuzhazaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhazaf|thezhazaf]] || [[word:jezhazaf|jezhazaf]] || [[word:shezhazaf|shezhazaf]] || [[word:kezhazaf|kezhazaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhazaf|thothozhazaf]] || [[word:jojozhazaf|jojozhazaf]] || [[word:shoshozhazaf|shoshozhazaf]] || [[word:kokozhazaf|kokozhazaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhazaf|thozhazaf]] || [[word:jozhazaf|jozhazaf]] || [[word:shozhazaf|shozhazaf]] || [[word:kozhazaf|kozhazaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhazaf|thozhazaf]] || [[word:jozhazaf|jozhazaf]] || [[word:shozhazaf|shozhazaf]] || [[word:kozhazaf|kozhazaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhazaf|thĂŠzhazaf]] || [[word:jĂŠzhazaf|jĂŠzhazaf]] || [[word:shĂŠzhazaf|shĂŠzhazaf]] || [[word:kĂŠzhazaf|kĂŠzhazaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhazaf|thathazhazaf]] || [[word:jajazhazaf|jajazhazaf]] || [[word:shashazhazaf|shashazhazaf]] || [[word:kakazhazaf|kakazhazaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhazaf|thazhazaf]] || [[word:jazhazaf|jazhazaf]] || [[word:shazhazaf|shazhazaf]] || [[word:kazhazaf|kazhazaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhazaf|thazhazaf]] || [[word:jazhazaf|jazhazaf]] || [[word:shazhazaf|shazhazaf]] || [[word:kazhazaf|kazhazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhazaf|shazhazaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhazaf|goshazhazaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhazaf|gokishazhazaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhazafnĂŒ|shazhazafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazafnknĂŒ|goshazhazafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazafnĂŒ|gokishazhazafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhazafshĂ«|shazhazafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkshĂ«|goshazhazafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhazafshĂ«|gokishazhazafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazafro|shazhazafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkro|goshazhazafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazafro|gokishazhazafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazafmu|shazhazafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkmu|goshazhazafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazafmu|gokishazhazafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhazafsher|shazhazafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhazafnksher|goshazhazafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhazafsher|gokishazhazafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhazafng|shazhazafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkng|goshazhazafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhazafng|gokishazhazafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhazafya|shazhazafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkya|goshazhazafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhazafya|gokishazhazafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhazafyam|shazhazafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkyam|goshazhazafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhazafyam|gokishazhazafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazafnĂŒshĂ«|shazhazafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhazafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhazafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazafnĂŒro|shazhazafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazafnknĂŒro|goshazhazafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazafnĂŒro|gokishazhazafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazafnĂŒmu|shazhazafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazafnknĂŒmu|goshazhazafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazafnĂŒmu|gokishazhazafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazafshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhazafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhazafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhazafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazafshĂ«ro|shazhazafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkshĂ«ro|goshazhazafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazafshĂ«ro|gokishazhazafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazafshĂ«mu|shazhazafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkshĂ«mu|goshazhazafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazafshĂ«mu|gokishazhazafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazafronĂŒ|shazhazafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkronĂŒ|goshazhazafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazafronĂŒ|gokishazhazafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazafroshĂ«|shazhazafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkroshĂ«|goshazhazafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazafroshĂ«|gokishazhazafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazafromu|shazhazafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkromu|goshazhazafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazafromu|gokishazhazafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazafmunĂŒ|shazhazafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkmunĂŒ|goshazhazafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazafmunĂŒ|gokishazhazafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazafmushĂ«|shazhazafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkmushĂ«|goshazhazafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazafmushĂ«|gokishazhazafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazafmuro|shazhazafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazafnkmuro|goshazhazafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazafmuro|gokishazhazafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
